title: 宝塚記念の後に・キーワード②

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I beat you, you beat me not! I beat you, you beat
me not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship bests Tosen Jordan with the haughty
triumph of a child on the playground! She also
gets a new clue, so that's nice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They promise to have a rematch on a big stage
next time. Meanwhile, the organizer of the search
for Eden and the clues remains unknown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fans congratulate Gold Ship on her second
consecutive victory at the Takarazuka Kinen. I
can't be happier about the monumental
achievement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship is over the moon. She buys red and
white bean buns to celebrate, but only gives me
the doughy parts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship is proud of herself, but it seems my
praise isn't enough, so she demands to be
properly lauded. It's kinda cute!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship is now ablaze. If she gets even hotter
next year, she could very well char the starting
gate beyond recognition. Please don't!
